name: Thomson Medical Group Limited
summary: Thomson Medical Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides healthcare services for women and children in Singapore, Malaysia, the United Kingdom, China, the Middle East, and internationally. The company owns and operates the Thomson Medical Center, as well as a network of 35 clinics and centers, which provide services in the areas of obstetrics, gynecology, pediatrics, aesthetics, cardiology, sports medicine, dermatology, cancer treatment, dental, traditional Chinese medicine, health screening, laboratory, and radiology; and offer diagnostic imaging, pharmacy, and outpatient services. It also provides consumer products and services, such as health supplements, skin care products, and mother and baby products. In addition, the company operates a pre-natal and clinical diagnostic laboratory; the Thomson Hospital Kota Damansara, a 205-bed hospital located in Kota Damansara, Kuala Lumpur; 6 fertility treatment centers under the TMC Fertility Center name; and the Vantage Bay Healthcare City, an integrated health and wellness development that consists of medical, wellness, and educational facilities located in Iskandar Malaysia. Further, it provides architect, planning, and engineering; research and development; property development; and engineering consultancy services. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Singapore.
